notes: Backend mode: added a one-line VPS installer (nova-backend.sh) + a Quick-install command box with Copy in the Backend mode panel card. The user runs it on their own VPS over SSH (credentials never collected/stored). It installs Xray, writes the WebSocket config, opens the firewall, offers a root-password change, and prints the exact Backend URL + client config. Bilingual EN/FA. Backend mode still OFF by default.
